note: Per-município ingest recipes for council resolutions + vote tallies. See scripts/council/README.md for the phased plan. Keys = MyArea obshtina id (matches area.obshtina). Run `npx tsx scripts/council/discover.ts --check` to re-validate liveness; --verbose dumps tally regex hits.

SOF.name: Столична община
SOF.indexNote: Liferay SPA. Full Council protocols + Постоянни комисии (ПК) protocols both surface as /documents/d/guest/protokol-<slug> PDFs. Discovery via Liferay search API or Playwright enumeration; direct curl on the search page returns the SPA shell only.
SOF.sampleConfirmedTally: Поименно гласуване block with За/Против/Въздържали се (dash = 0)
SOF.perCouncillorNote: Phase 2 — Sofia is the only confirmed-text per-councillor source; join to data/officials/municipal/ by normalised name.

PDV01.name: Община Пловдив
PDV01.indexNote: WordPress category. WebFetch hits 403 (UA-based block); direct curl with browser UA works for HEAD but index links are JS-paginated. Use Playwright for enumeration. Separate document store at plovdiv.obshtini.bg may also carry full protocols.

VAR01.name: Община Варна
VAR01.indexNote: Static HTML index of decisions by mandate. Individual decisions link to PDF protokol attachments; aggregate tally typically inside the PDF body.

BGS01.name: Община Бургас
BGS01.indexNote: Custom CMS with /node/<id> URL pattern per session. Aggregate vote totals not on the HTML index — embedded in the linked protocol documents. Drill-in by enumerating node ids.

SZR01.name: Община Стара Загора
SZR01.indexNote: Upgraded from tier C to A on 2026-05-29: SZR now publishes per-decision NATIVE TEXT PDFs at /uploads/posts/{YYYY}/prepis_{NNNN}.pdf, each carrying one Решение + ОТНОСНО:/ПО ТОЧКА... headers + aggregate tally in label-first form ('Гласуване: за – N, против - N и въздържали се – N'). Older protocols (pre-2024) still have scanned-only voting; the parser routes those through Gemini OCR when --ocr is passed.

RSE01.name: Община Русе
RSE01.indexNote: WordPress document archive. Files are DOCX (occasional PDF) under /wp-content/uploads/YYYY/MM/. File naming inconsistent: 'протокол-33.docx', 'ПРОТОКОЛ_32.docx', '29-1.docx'. Date / session number is in the archive page metadata, not in the filename — index walk must capture both.

PVN01.name: Община Плевен
PVN01.indexNote: Custom CMS. Protocols at uploads/posts/protokol{N|-N}{|1}.{docx,pdf} (mixed conventions). Index page is reliable for enumeration; date + session number must be read from the surrounding HTML cells, not the filename.

VTR01.name: Община Велико Търново
VTR01.indexNote: Per-year sub-pages at /bg/resheniya-{YYYY}-godina/. Slug pattern resheniya-saglasno-protokol-N-ot-DDMMYYYY-g. Aggregate tally typically on the HTML decision page.

BLG03.name: Община Благоевград
BLG03.indexNote: Rediscovered 2026-05-29: the new path /header-menu/resheniia-na-obshtinski-suvet exists and links to per-year archive pages (/header-menu/resheniia-2026-godina, /header-menu/arhiv-na-resheniia-2025 through /header-menu/arhiv-na-resheniia-2012) and per-mandate pages (/header-menu/mandat-2023-2027-godina, /header-menu/mandat-2019-2023-godina). However, the year + mandate archive pages render only navigation chrome — NO decision PDFs / DOCX / HTML listings are published. Confirmed by direct Playwright probe of /resheniia-2026-godina, /arhiv-na-resheniia-2025, /arhiv-na-resheniia-2024, /arhiv-na-resheniia-2023, /arhiv-na-resheniia-2018, /mandat-2023-2027-godina, /mandat-2019-2023-godina — every relevant <a> href on these pages is either site navigation, language toggles, or government-portal externals. The município's news page mentions they BROADCAST sessions live ('обявление: Община Благоевград излъчва заседанията на Общински Съвет...') but document publication is not part of that. The earlier-rumoured e-obs.online migration is also unreachable: blagoevgrad.e-obs.online and e-obs.online/blagoevgrad return 000/404/526. Phase 1 stays DEFERRED — not a parser problem, a publication-policy gap.
BLG03.deferReason: Confirmed 2026-05-29: blagoevgrad.bg publishes navigation chrome only; no decision PDFs/DOCX in any year archive. e-obs.online SaaS unreachable. Awaiting either município publication-policy change or a discovered third-party mirror.

SLV01.name: Община Сливен
SLV01.indexNote: Upgraded from tier C to A on 2026-05-29: hash-named /uploads/<HEX32> PDFs are ABBYY FineReader 15 output with CLEAN Cyrillic text layer (unlike Sofia's FineReader 14 mojibake). One PDF per session bundles all decisions separated by 'Препис!' markers. The session date is encoded in the anchor label ('Взети решения на сесията на Общинския съвет на DD.MM.YYYY г.') since the hash filenames carry no metadata. ПРЕПИС-ИЗВЛЕЧЕНИЕ format = decision text only, NO vote tally published (same as Varna/Burgas/Plovdiv).

DOB28.name: Община град Добрич
DOB28.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. Full session protokols at dobrich.bg/uploads/posts/{YYYY}/protokol-{N}_{DD-MM-YYYY}.pdf. Discovery via Wayback CDX (live site partially JS-rendered). Born-digital text-layer (~200 pages per session, ~45 decisions each). Two layout quirks needed custom handling: (1) dual-numbered resolution markers 'РЕШЕНИЕ <session> – <item>:' instead of 'РЕШЕНИЕ № N' — parser uses its own MARKER_RE; (2) tally separator is a SEMICOLON ('„ЗА" - 39; „ПРОТИВ" - 0; „ВЪЗДЪРЖАЛИ СЕ" - 0'), parser pre-processes the text to swap '; ' → ', ' inside ПОИМЕННО ГЛАСУВАЛИ blocks so the shared SUMMARY_RE_LABEL_FIRST matches. NO per-councillor block — protokol records only aggregate totals. Coverage tier B (decision metadata + tally + adopted/rejected, no perCouncillor).

HKV09.name: Община Димитровград
HKV09.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. Static paginated HTML index (/page/10, /page/20, ...) with 220+ pages of sessions back to 2009. Each session page links a single .doc (Word 97-2003 binary, codepage 1251) under /uploads/posts/{YYYY}/{DDMMYYYY}-za-publ.doc — full protokol with chair-narrated tallies. Per-decision .docx files (r-{N}-{slug}.docx) are also published on the companion /bg/resheniya-na-obs page but contain only the signed body, no tally. Parser converts the .doc via macOS textutil (matches scripts/budget/capital_programs/vidin.ts convention). Tally form is VERBOSE label-first with semicolon separators and quoted Bulgarian-style labels ('„за" – 22 общински съветници; „против" – 2; „въздържали се" – 0'), already matched by the shared SUMMARY_RE_VERBOSE — no pre-processing needed. РЕШЕНИЕ markers use letter-spaced 'Р  Е  Ш  Е  Н  И  Е № NNN' (textutil output). Tally PRECEDES the marker (chair narrates result first). NO per-councillor block. Coverage tier B (aggregate tally + adopted/rejected, no perCouncillor).
HKV09.sampleConfirmedTally: гласували  „за" – 29 общински съветници; „против" – 0; „въздържали се" – 1 – общо 30 гласували

RAZ26.name: Община Разград
RAZ26.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. Joomla session-list with ?start={N} pagination — current mandate (2023-2027) sessions at /protokoli-i-zapisi-na-zasedania-na-obsinski-s-vet/protokol-no{N}. Each session page links a single .docx at /images/OBS_doc/2023-2027/{YYYY}/OS-{DD-MM-YYYY}/Protokol_{N}/Protokol_{N}.docx (born-digital text). Tally vocabulary is the most heterogeneous in the fleet — five distinct chair-narrated forms (split-quote SHORTHAND, без-form, partial-form, label-second NEGATIVE, digit-first with -ма Bulgarian numeral suffix). Parser pre-processes all five into the canonical SHORTHAND  so the shared SUMMARY_RE_SHORTHAND matches. РЕШЕНИЕ markers in standard  form. Tally PRECEDES marker (chair narrates result first). NO per-councillor block — only chair-announced totals. Coverage tier B (decision metadata + tally + adopted/rejected, no perCouncillor), equivalent to HKV09 / HKV34 / DOB28 / SZR / RSE / Pleven.

HKV34.name: Община Хасково
HKV34.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. 89 protokol PDFs in Wayback CDX at the clean pattern haskovo.bg/uploads/posts/{YYYY}/protokol-{N}.pdf. Born-digital text-layer (~110 pages per session). Tally form is novel — chair-announcement prose ('Т.ЗАХАРИЕВА: С 37 гласа „за", без „против" и „въздържали се"'). The parser PRE-PROCESSES the text to rewrite Хасково's form into the canonical V. Tarnovo form ('37 „за", 0 „против", 0 „въздържали се"') so the shared SUMMARY_RE_DIGIT_FIRST matches without adding yet another municípality-specific variant to lib/tally.ts. NO per-councillor block — Хасково records only the chair's totals, not the individual vote tablet readout. Coverage tier B (aggregate tally + adopted/rejected, no perCouncillor), equivalent to SZR / RSE / Pleven.
HKV34.sampleConfirmedTally: Т.ЗАХАРИЕВА: С 37 гласа „за", без „против" и „въздържали се"

SZR12.name: Община Казанлък
SZR12.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. Nuxt-rendered category page (cat-3.html) doesn't expose protokol links in curl output; discovery uses Wayback Machine CDX + a focused brute-force HEAD probe across {YYYY-MM} subdirectories. URL pattern: /common/docs/{YYYY-MM}/Protokol_{N}_SAIT.pdf (canonical 2024+) with legacy fallbacks Protokol_{N}.pdf / Protokol_{N}_{DD}_{MM}_{YYYY}.pdf / {N}_Protokol.pdf. Text-layer PDFs, no OCR. Per-councillor block uses '<N>. <Three-part name>: За|Против|Въздържал се' (standard VOTE_LINE_RE shape). Aggregate tally: 'Общинският съвет гласува поименно и със "за" - 26, "против" - 0 и "въздържали се" - 0' (matches SUMMARY_RE_LABEL_FIRST). РЕШЕНИЕ № N anchors.
SZR12.sampleConfirmedTally: Общинският съвет гласува поименно и със 'за' - 26, 'против' - 0 и 'въздържали се' - 0

GAB05.name: Община Габрово
GAB05.indexNote: Wired 2026-05-29. Apache /files/OBS/zasedania/protokol/{YYYY}/ directory returns 403, so discovery uses the Wayback Machine CDX index for historical sessions + a brute-force probe of the current year (HEAD requests, ~25 sessions × 12 months × 31 days max, terminates fast on first hit per session). Born-digital text-layer PDFs. Per-councillor block uses uppercase tabular layout: 'NN  <Three-part name>  ЗА|ПРОТИВ|ВЪЗДЪРЖАЛИ СЕ|отсъста' (novel отсъства/absent column dropped at extractNamedVoteBlock). Aggregate tally form: 'За – 29, против – 0, въздържали се – 0' (matches SUMMARY_RE_LABEL_FIRST). РЕШЕНИЕ № N anchors; title sits 2-3 lines below after a date line.

discoverySweep2026_05_29.note: Triage of the next 24 unscraped municipalities by population. Tiers A/B/C/D match the README scheme. Use this as the working list when picking the next parser to wire.

tierA.name: Габрово
tierA.confirmed: born-digital text-layer PDF with per-councillor block (1..N name vote columns including отсъства), aggregate tally 'За – N, против – M, въздържали се – K'

tierB_unverified.name: Шумен
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: session pages link only покана/agenda PDFs at uploads/posts/{YYYY}/. The PDFs are PDFium-produced with malformed flate streams → pdftotext silently outputs 0 bytes. No протоколи or решения index found yet. Needs deeper probe.

tierB_unverified.name: Хасково
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: 89 protokol PDFs in Wayback CDX at haskovo.bg/uploads/posts/{YYYY}/protokol-{N}.pdf — clean URL pattern. Born-digital text-layer (~110 pages per session, full prose). Aggregate tallies via chair's announcements ('Т.ЗАХАРИЕВА: С 37 гласа „за“, без „против“ и „въздържали се“') in a NOVEL form not matched by any existing tally regex variant (needs SUMMARY_RE for 'С N гласа „за“[, без|, M „против“][, без|, K „въздържали се“]'). NO per-councillor block — the protokol records the chair's announcement, not the individual vote tablet readout. Wiring would add aggregate-only coverage (tier B equivalent to SZR/RSE/Pleven) — meaningful but doesn't unlock per-councillor signals.

tierB_unverified.name: Перник
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: WordPress category #7 has count=0 (empty). WP REST API confirms zero posts. The archive category exists but contains no published decisions — possibly migrated to a different category or unpublished for 2023-2027 mandate.

tierB_unverified.name: Монтана
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: 37 protokol PDFs in Wayback CDX but all are committee minutes (Protokol-komisia, Protokol1-DSP_2017 etc) under wp-content/uploads/{YYYY-MM}/ — not full council protokols. The older /docs/os/z/ directory (where full protokols once lived) returns 404 on the live site and Wayback has only 2 stub copies. Site migrated but legacy URLs lost.

tierB_unverified.name: Горна Оряховица
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: Joomla K2 site at savet.gornaoryahovitsa.bg with categories per session ('заседание-N-DD-MM-YYYY'). Sub-category 'дневен ред, протоколи и решения - заседание N' EXISTS but currently only links the agenda item (item/{id}-dneven-red-zasedanie-{N}). Protokols / decisions are NOT yet published — across 10 historical sessions (cat 103..125) each had at most 1 item, none were a protokol. Files are stored on a separate Nextcloud at cloud.gornaoryahovitsa.bg/index.php/s/<token> with /download endpoint. Effectively tier C/D until publishing policy changes.

tierB_unverified.name: Ловеч
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: site stale — latest decision is from 2019-09-26. Decisions are scanned PDFs (CCITT grayscale, would need OCR). Not viable until publication resumes.

tierB_unverified.name: Видин
tierB_unverified.probedNote: Probed 2026-05-29: WPS portal JS-rendered, TSPD anti-bot guard returns only '<a href="/TSPD/?type=25">' on direct curl. Would need Playwright.

tierD_noPublicSite: DOB15 (Добрич-селска — punycode-only domain, no recent content)
